series_metadata.series_description: The ODNR Office of Coastal Management maintains files related to site-specific notices of non-compliance with any of the provisions of Ohio’s Coastal Management Act (O.R.C. Chapter 1506). Files may contain notifications of potential non-compliance, correspondence, site assessments, and site photographs.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Permanent unless replaced by a legible electronic version, Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Recycle
